query:
-- ระดับ 1: primary batch sum (paid_date + created_date + updated_by) >= 1000
-- ระดับ 2: fallback sum (created_date + updated_by) >= 1000 แม้ primary < 1000
WITH last_row AS (
  SELECT
    inner_q.contract_no,
    inner_q.section,
    inner_q.last_paid_date,
    inner_q.last_created_date,
    inner_q.last_updated_by
  FROM (
    SELECT
      pt2.contract_no,
      pt2.section,
      DATE(pt2.paid_at) AS last_paid_date,
      DATE(pt2.created_at) AS last_created_date,
      pt2.updated_by AS last_updated_by,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY pt2.contract_no, pt2.section
        ORDER BY pt2.created_at DESC
      ) AS rn
    FROM payment_transactions pt2
    WHERE pt2.section = 'Fastfone365'
      AND JSON_EXTRACT(pt2.raw_json, '$.source') IS NULL
  ) AS inner_q
  WHERE inner_q.rn = 1
),
primary_agg AS (
  SELECT
    pt3.contract_no,
    pt3.section,
    DATE(pt3.paid_at) AS paid_date,
    DATE(pt3.created_at) AS created_date,
    pt3.updated_by,
    SUM(CAST(COALESCE(pt3.amount, 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS batch_sum
  FROM payment_transactions pt3
  WHERE pt3.section = 'Fastfone365'
    AND JSON_EXTRACT(pt3.raw_json, '$.source') IS NULL
  GROUP BY pt3.contract_no, pt3.section, DATE(pt3.paid_at), DATE(pt3.created_at), pt3.updated_by
),
fallback_agg AS (
  SELECT
    pt4.contract_no,
    pt4.section,
    DATE(pt4.created_at) AS created_date,
    pt4.updated_by,
    SUM(CAST(COALESCE(pt4.amount, 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS fallback_sum
  FROM payment_transactions pt4
  WHERE pt4.section = 'Fastfone365'
    AND JSON_EXTRACT(pt4.raw_json, '$.source') IS NULL
  GROUP BY pt4.contract_no, pt4.section, DATE(pt4.created_at), pt4.updated_by
),
classified AS (
  SELECT
    lr.contract_no,
    lr.section,
    lr.last_paid_date,
    lr.last_created_date,
    lr.last_updated_by,
    COALESCE(pa.batch_sum, 0) AS primary_sum,
    COALESCE(fa.fallback_sum, 0) AS fb_sum,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(pa.batch_sum, 0) >= 1000 THEN 'level1'
      WHEN COALESCE(pa.batch_sum, 0) < 1000 AND COALESCE(fa.fallback_sum, 0) >= 1000 THEN 'level2'
      ELSE 'not_device'
    END AS device_level
  FROM last_row lr
  LEFT JOIN primary_agg pa
    ON pa.contract_no = lr.contract_no AND pa.section = lr.section
    AND pa.paid_date = lr.last_paid_date AND pa.created_date = lr.last_created_date AND pa.updated_by = lr.last_updated_by
  LEFT JOIN fallback_agg fa
    ON fa.contract_no = lr.contract_no AND fa.section = lr.section
    AND fa.created_date = lr.last_created_date AND fa.updated_by = lr.last_updated_by
)
SELECT
  device_level,
  COUNT(*) AS contract_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN device_level = 'level1' THEN primary_sum ELSE fb_sum END) AS total_amount
FROM classified
WHERE device_level IN ('level1', 'level2')
GROUP BY device_level
ORDER BY device_level;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute
